step_rationale: Amino acid biomarker in CAD; metabolic pathway marker not plaque-specific.
mechanism: Methionine metabolism is altered in CAD and associated with acute MI risk through systemic metabolic derangement.

references.title: Improved Risk Prediction of Acute Myocardial Infarction in Patients With Stable Coronary Artery Disease Using an Amino Acid-Assisted Model.
